data.name: Hentai Clicker: Midori is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Midori is streaming

Step into a world of lust and chaos where Midori, your wild, violet-haired nympho, reacts to every click with explosive desire. Tease, tempt, and unlock her dirtiest secrets—one outfit at a time.

🍆 About the Game

Get ready for a dangerously hot mix of clicker mechanics and raw sexual energy. Every click draws you deeper into Midori’s shameless world, where moans, surprises, and naughty challenges await. Collect hearts to unlock slutty outfits, sexy animations, and filthy voice lines as things heat up fast.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

Hentai Clicker: Midori is streaming includes explicit NSFW scenes, from playful teasing to full-on hardcore madness.

🎉 Features

🎨 Bold Anime Visuals – Hot, high-energy art that brings Midori’s wild side to life.
💜 Nympho Queen – Violet hair, zero shame, and endless stamina.
🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Easy to pick up, impossible to stop.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From innocence to XXX-rated gear.
🔊 Voice Acting & Dirty Talk – She reacts to every click with gasps, giggles, and dirty whispers.
🚀 Goals – Stack hearts, level up, and unlock her most insane fantasies.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you're craving high-octane lewdness, addicting progression, and a girl who wants it more than you do—Midori is your dream gone rogue. She's not here to flirt—she’s here to ruin you.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap turns her on a little more.
🔓 Unlock Scenes – Spend hearts to undress her, pose her, and please her.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Make things faster, dirtier, and much more intense.

🎉 Start Your Midori Mayhem!

Ready to lose control? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Midori is streaming and let this nympho take you for the ride of your life.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 德文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
